name: Delectabites
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix butter, sugar, and vanilla until blended. Gradually stir in flour and walnuts.
3. Shape into crescents or 1-inch balls. Place on ungreased cookie sheets.
4. Bake in the upper third of the oven for 10 minutes or until firm but not brown. Gently roll each cookie in additional powdered sugar.
5. Cool on wire racks. Drizzle cookies with melted chocolate. Let stand on wax paper until chocolate is firm. Makes 2 dozen.
